label: scikit-learn
description: Machine learning library for classification, regression, and clustering.

phases.label: ML Fundamentals
phases.description: Estimator API, preprocessing, and model evaluation.

topics.label: Estimator API
topics.description: fit, predict, transform. The consistent interface for all sklearn models.

topics.label: Preprocessing
topics.description: StandardScaler, MinMaxScaler, LabelEncoder, OneHotEncoder. Prepare data for models.

topics.label: Train/Test Split
topics.description: train_test_split, cross_val_score, StratifiedKFold. Evaluate model generalization.

topics.label: Classification
topics.description: LogisticRegression, RandomForest, SVM, KNN. accuracy_score, classification_report.

topics.label: Regression
topics.description: LinearRegression, Ridge, Lasso, GradientBoosting. MSE, R², and residual analysis.

topics.label: Clustering
topics.description: KMeans, DBSCAN, AgglomerativeClustering. silhouette_score and elbow method.

phases.label: Advanced sklearn
phases.description: Pipelines, hyperparameter tuning, and feature engineering.

topics.label: Pipelines
topics.description: Pipeline and ColumnTransformer for reproducible workflows. Chain preprocessing and models.

topics.label: Hyperparameter Tuning
topics.description: GridSearchCV, RandomizedSearchCV. Find optimal model parameters.

topics.label: Feature Selection
topics.description: SelectKBest, RFE, feature_importances_. Identify the most informative features.

topics.label: Model Persistence
topics.description: joblib.dump/load for saving trained models. Deploy models in production.

topics.label: Metrics & Evaluation
topics.description: confusion_matrix, ROC/AUC, precision/recall curves. Beyond accuracy.
